description_long: This nightstand features a classic, elegant design with a raised back panel adorned with subtle carved detailing. The main body includes two drawers with ornate, vintage-style handles, providing storage space. The tabletop is broad and flat, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. The legs are turned and tapered, giving the piece a traditional and refined appearance. The finish is a uniform, light color, likely painted wood, contributing to a clean and timeless look. Decorative flourishes on the back panel and drawer fronts add a touch of sophistication.
description: A classic nightstand with two drawers, ornate handles, turned legs, and a decorative raised back panel in a light painted finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with ornate handles, turned legs, and the decorative raised back panel with carved detailing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the profile of the raised back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, undecorated back and the full height of the raised panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same profile as view 1, with the turned leg design and side panel.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
